name: slopslurp
description: Professional search results by slurping up AI Overview slop, low-quality sites, and advertisements from Google Search

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy && npm run minify && npm run obfuscate
scripts.build:dev: npm run clean && npm run copy
scripts.copy: npm run copy:static && npm run copy:popup && npm run copy:js && npm run copy:css && npm run copy:data
scripts.copy:static: mkdir -p dist && cp manifest.json src/popup/popup.html dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.copy:popup: mkdir -p dist/popup/images && cp -r src/popup/images/* dist/popup/images/ || true
scripts.copy:js: mkdir -p dist/js && cp src/js/*.js dist/js/ && cp src/content/content-script.js dist/
scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.minify:js: npx terser dist/js/popup.js -o dist/js/popup.js --compress --mangle && npx terser dist/js/utils.js -o dist/js/utils.js --compress --mangle && npx terser dist/content-script.js -o dist/content-script.js --compress --mangle
scripts.obfuscate:js: npx javascript-obfuscator dist/js/popup.js --output dist/js/popup.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --transform-object-keys true && npx javascript-obfuscator dist/js/utils.js --output dist/js/utils.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --transform-object-keys true && npx javascript-obfuscator dist/content-script.js --output dist/content-script.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding base64 --transform-object-keys true
scripts.package: npm run build && npm run zip
scripts.watch: npm run build:dev && npm run watch:files
scripts.watch:files: npx nodemon --watch src/js/ --watch src/css/ --watch src/content/ --watch src/popup/popup.html --watch manifest.json --ext js,css,html,json --exec 'npm run build:dev'
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run build && echo '✅ Extension validated successfully'
scripts.analyze: npm run build && npx webpack-bundle-analyzer dist --no-open

author: CharlieS1103
